{
  AddressGenerated:
// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="Address"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableAddress
    {
        private Address _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableAddress"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableAddress(Address record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Street = _record.Street;
            City = _record.City;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Address"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public Address Build()
        {
            OnBeforeBuild();
            return _record with
            {
                Street = this.Street,
                City = this.City,
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Address"/> record. Alias for <see cref="Build"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public Address ToImmutable()
        {
            return Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Called at the start of <see cref="Build"/>, before the immutable record is produced.
        /// </summary>
        /// Implement this method in a user-defined partial class to validate or normalise state.
        partial void OnBeforeBuild();

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="Address"/> to <see cref="MutableAddress"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableAddress(Address record)
        {
            return new MutableAddress(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableAddress"/> to <see cref="Address"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator Address(MutableAddress mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Street.
        /// </summary>
        public string Street { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the City.
        /// </summary>
        public string City { get; set; }
    }
}
,
  PersonGenerated:
// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="Person"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutablePerson
    {
        private Person _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutablePerson"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutablePerson(Person record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Name = _record.Name;
            HomeAddress = _record.HomeAddress;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Person"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public Person Build()
        {
            OnBeforeBuild();
            return _record with
            {
                Name = this.Name,
                HomeAddress = this.HomeAddress,
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Person"/> record. Alias for <see cref="Build"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public Person ToImmutable()
        {
            return Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Called at the start of <see cref="Build"/>, before the immutable record is produced.
        /// </summary>
        /// Implement this method in a user-defined partial class to validate or normalise state.
        partial void OnBeforeBuild();

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="Person"/> to <see cref="MutablePerson"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutablePerson(Person record)
        {
            return new MutablePerson(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutablePerson"/> to <see cref="Person"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator Person(MutablePerson mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Name.
        /// </summary>
        public string Name { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Record HomeAddress.
        /// </summary>
        public MutableAddress HomeAddress { get; set; }
    }
}

}
